title: Reagent A expiration tracker
description: Tracking the reagents I'm responsible for on shelf 2.

entries.title: 2026-05-04: reagent tracker
entries.content:
Tracking the reagents I'm responsible for on shelf 2.

- SYBR Master Mix (lot DEMO-2025-04): opened 2026-04-12, expires 2026-07-12
- fakeGFP-fwd primer (10 µM aliquot): opened 2026-03-22, use by 2026-09-22
- fakeGFP-rev primer (10 µM aliquot): opened 2026-03-22, use by 2026-09-22
- ACT1-fwd / ACT1-rev (10 µM aliquots): made fresh 2026-05-01, use by 2026-11-01
- 50% PEG-3350 (autoclaved stock): made 2026-04-30, replace by 2026-07-30
- 1 M LiAc stock: made 2026-05-01, replace by 2026-08-01
- DEMO mScarlet plasmid prep: 2026-05-04, stored in freezer 5, OK indefinitely

Reminder: re-aliquot the SYBR master mix on 2026-06-12 before opening a fresh tube.
